body_txt: A character that doesn't require the same physical or mental needs to survive or remain healthy as humans. Or, at least, they lack one need. It could be anything from eating , " waste excretion ", heat/warmth, sleep , breathing or even companionship (we're talking an entire lifetime of complete isolation here, not just being The Stoic ). They just don't need it, unlike those poor old Homo sapiens . They may still choose to do these things (if they can, for that matter), but it's not a requirement. Subtropes include: Not to be confused with manga and anime NEEDLESS .   See also Ideal Illness Immunity . A character with Complete Immortality will generally also be needless.
